recommendations.title: McFarland, USA
recommendations.overview: A track coach in a small California town transforms a team of athletes into championship contenders.

recommendations.title: The Zookeeper's Wife
recommendations.overview: The account of keepers of the Warsaw Zoo, Jan and Antonina Zabinski, who helped save hundreds of people and animals during the Nazi invasion.

recommendations.title: Whale Rider
recommendations.overview: A contemporary story of love, rejection, and triumph as a young Māori girl fights to fulfill a destiny her grandfather refuses to recognize.

recommendations.title: The Mother
recommendations.overview: A deadly female assassin comes out of hiding to protect the daughter that she gave up years before, while on the run from dangerous men.

recommendations.title: Mulan
recommendations.overview: When the Emperor of China issues a decree that one man per family must serve in the Imperial Chinese Army to defend the country from Huns, Hua Mulan, the eldest daughter of an honored warrior, steps in to take the place of her ailing father. She is s

recommendations.title: There's Still Tomorrow
recommendations.overview: In postwar Rome, a working-class woman dreams of a better future for herself and her daughter while facing abuse at the hands of her domineering husband. When a mysterious letter arrives, she discovers the courage to change the circumstances of her l

recommendations.title: 13th
recommendations.overview: An in-depth look at the prison system in the United States and how it reveals the nation's history of racial inequality.

recommendations.title: Letters from Iwo Jima
recommendations.overview: The story of the battle of Iwo Jima between the United States and Imperial Japan during World War II, as told from the perspective of the Japanese who fought it.

recommendations.title: Dawn Breaks, Which Is No Small Thing
recommendations.overview: Teodoro, a Spanish engineer working as a professor in the United States, returns to Spain to enjoy a sabbatical year.

recommendations.title: Nomadland
recommendations.overview: A woman in her sixties embarks on a journey through the western United States after losing everything in the Great Recession, living as a van-dwelling modern-day nomad.
